focus: [D5-A3/D5] the mcp-open-design pairing is parent-resident - must be re-asserted transport-side inside the CLI child

graphEvents.label: How should a CLI child re-assert the sk-design plus mcp-open-design pairing before Open Design design-feeding work?
sk-design and mcp-open-design declare a mandatory transport/taste pair, but the declaration is local to the active skill context
The cli-* ALWAYS sections carry spec-folder and code-standards pass-through rules but no Open Design child-resident transport pairing rule
The cli-opencode design template requires sk-design proof but has no mcp-open-design transport branch
Open Design start_run is a multi-turn generation boundary, so parent validation needs a child transport result, not only final prose
Agent I/O is optional-advisory and cannot be the hard carrier for Open Design transport proof
Any CLI child asked to perform Open Design design-feeding work must load both sk-design and mcp-open-design inside the child runtime and emit OPEN_DESIGN_TRANSPORT_ASSERTION v1
Any CLI child that uses Open Design must return OPEN_DESIGN_TRANSPORT_RESULT v1 matching the dispatched design manifest and transport assertion digests
